description: You are a wholesale sales representative who needs to create a formal quote for a client. Create a new Quote in Vtiger CRM for GreenTech Solutions with the subject 'Q-2024-GreenTech-Peripherals'. Set the Quote Stage to 'Created', the Valid Until date to '2025-03-31', and the description to 'Peripheral equipment quote for GreenTech Solutions Q1 2025 office refresh'. Include the following line items: 25 Wireless Bluetooth Headsets at 49.99 each, 10 USB-C Docking Stations at 129.99 each, and 15 Ergonomic Keyboards at 79.99 each.
